``` ::: ::: ## QUESTION|TASK 2 __Recreate the example charts from [PY4DS: CH2 Data Visualization](https://aeturrell.github.io/python4DS/data-visualise.html) of the textbook. (Hint: copy the chart code from 2.2.3. Creating a plot, one plot for each cell below)__ ::: {#e7c44b0d .cell execution_count=5} ``` {.python .cell-code} # Include and execute your code here ( ggplot(data=penguins, mapping=aes(x="flipper_length_mm", y="body_mass_g")) + geom_point() ) ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-display execution_count=5} ```{=html}
``` ::: ::: _include figures in chunks and discuss your findings in the figure._ ::: {#eb309e52 .cell execution_count=6} ``` {.python .cell-code} # Include and execute your code here ( ggplot( data=penguins, mapping=aes(x="flipper_length_mm", y="body_mass_g", color="species"), ) + geom_point() ) ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-display execution_count=6} ```{=html}
``` ::: ::: ::: {#a12e7cab .cell execution_count=7} ``` {.python .cell-code} # Include and execute your code here ( ggplot( data=penguins, mapping=aes(x="flipper_length_mm", y="body_mass_g", color="species"), ) + geom_point() + geom_smooth(method="lm") ) ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-display execution_count=7} ```{=html}
``` ::: ::: ::: {#22611a01 .cell execution_count=8} ``` {.python .cell-code} # Include and execute your code here ( ggplot(data=penguins, mapping=aes(x="flipper_length_mm", y="body_mass_g")) + geom_point(mapping=aes(color="species")) + geom_smooth(method="lm") ) ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-display execution_count=8} ```{=html}
``` ::: ::: ::: {#54c2a550 .cell execution_count=9} ``` {.python .cell-code} # Include and execute your code here ( ggplot(data=penguins, mapping=aes(x="flipper_length_mm", y="body_mass_g")) + geom_point(aes(color="species", shape="species")) + geom_smooth(method="lm") + labs( title="Body mass and flipper length", subtitle="Dimensions for Adelie, Chinstrap, and Gentoo Penguins", x="Flipper length (mm)", y="Body mass (g)", color="Species", shape="Species", ) ) ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-display execution_count=9} ```{=html}
